_notes.fileWriteTool.js: Duplicate of writeFileTool from fileTool.js — registry.js already registers write_file from fileTool.js with identical name. fileWriteTool.js adds security checks but is never actually registered or used in the agent pipeline.
_notes.loguru.py: Stub fallback logger — Python's stdlib logging is used via app.py. This file is only imported as `from loguru import logger` fallback.
_notes.instance/eva.db: Flask-SQLAlchemy instance file, gitignored at runtime. Safe to delete from repo (recreated on startup).
_notes.speech/speech_integration.py: Only referenced in commented-out code blocks. All its methods return disabled errors anyway.
_notes.core/__init__.py, speech/__init__.py, co: Empty package inits with no exports.
_notes.data_analysis/data_processor.py: Duplicate of analytics/data_processor.py — different file, same purpose.
